overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traversing a snowy mountain pass at sunset, transitioning through grassy highlands dotted with ancient stone ruins while descending toward a distant village in the valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy mountain pass between rock walls

events.description: a horse becomes visible standing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging through a narrow snowy mountain pass with swords on his back, approaching a horse on the trail

notable_agents.action: horse standing on the snowy path ahead, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: tall rock face covered in snow forming the left wall of the narrow pass
long icicles hanging from rock overhangs above the path
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the pass ahead
snow-covered ground with footprints along the narrow trail
leafless dead tree standing on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt traverses a narrow, enclosed snowy mountain pass with high rock walls on either side. Long icicles hang from the rocks overhead as the golden hour sun illuminates the snow. A horse stands on the path ahead, becoming visible as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with wooden shrine structure

events.description: character passes the horse on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the widening path, passing the horse and approaching a small wooden shrine structure

notable_agents.action: horse standing still as the character passes by on the right side

entered.detail: small wooden shrine or offering structure with a sloped roof on the left side of the path
tall thin stone pillar or marker visible on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The path widens as Geralt passes the stationary horse on the right. A small wooden shrine appears on the left side of the trail. The enclosing rock walls fall away, revealing more of the mountain range ahead as the terrain begins to transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy highland with ancient stone ruins

events.description: ground surface transitions from snow to mixed grass and dirt terrain
distant village becomes visible in the valley below

agents.ego_description: Geralt descends through grassy terrain dotted with ancient stone ruins and scattered evergreen trees

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins covered in patches of snow and moss
cluster of pine and spruce trees on the hillsides ahead
small settlement with wooden buildings visible in the distant valley

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into a wide valley as the snow gives way to grassy ground. Ancient stone ruins line the left side of the path while evergreen trees dot the landscape. A distant village becomes visible in the valley below as the character continues descending.

events.description: village buildings become more prominent and detailed as the path descends further

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues down the winding path toward the village, passing stone wall ruins as the valley opens up

entered.detail: expansive view of the valley floor with the village nestled among the hills

segments.scene_description: The path continues descending through the wide valley with stone ruins now appearing on the right. The village grows larger and more detailed in the center of the frame, nestled in the valley below. The terrain is now fully grassy with scattered rocks and the sun sits low on the horizon, casting long shadows across the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a claustrophobic, snowy mountain pass into a wide, sun-drenched grassy valley. It begins within a narrow corridor of high rock walls and hanging icicles, where the golden hour sun illuminates the snow as a horse appears on the path ahead. As the camera passes the horse, the enclosing walls fall away and the path widens past a small wooden shrine, revealing the broader mountain range. The scene then opens into a vast valley where the snow gives way to green grass and evergreen trees, with ancient stone ruins lining the trail as a distant village emerges below. Finally, the path continues its descent through the grassy terrain and scattered rocks, with the village growing larger in the center of the frame while the low sun casts long shadows across the landscape.
